mapper.select: SELECT P.post_id, U.nickname AS writer_nickname, P.title, P.board_type, P.like_count, P.comment_count, COUNT(R.report_id) AS report_count, P.created_at, P.status FROM community_posts P JOIN users U ON P.writer_id = U.user_id LEFT JOIN reports R ON R.target_type = 'POST' AND R.target_id = P.post_id GROUP BY P.post_id, U.nickname, P.title, P.board_type, P.like_count, P.comment_count, P.created_at, P.status ORDER BY P.created_at DESC, p.post_id DESC

SELECT P.post_id, U.nickname AS writer_nickname, P.title, P.board_type, P.like_count, P.comment_count, COUNT(R.report_id) AS report_count, P.created_at, P.status FROM community_posts P JOIN users U ON P.writer_id = U.user_id LEFT JOIN reports R ON R.target_type = 'POST' AND R.target_id = P.post_id WHERE P.post_id = #{postId} GROUP BY P.post_id, U.nickname, P.title, P.board_type, P.like_count, P.comment_count, P.created_at, P.status

SELECT P.post_id, U.nickname AS writer_nickname, P.title, P.board_type, P.like_count, P.comment_count, COUNT(R.report_id) AS report_count, P.created_at, P.status FROM community_posts P JOIN users U ON P.writer_id = U.user_id LEFT JOIN reports R ON R.target_type = 'POST' AND R.target_id = P.post_id
GROUP BY P.post_id, U.nickname, P.title, P.board_type, P.like_count, P.comment_count, P.created_at, P.status ORDER BY P.created_at DESC, P.post_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_posts P JOIN users U ON P.writer_id = U.user_id

where.if: AND ( P.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR U.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT C.comment_id, C.post_id, U.nickname AS writer_nickname, C.content, COUNT(R.report_id) AS report_count, C.created_at, C.status FROM comments C JOIN users U ON C.writer_id = U.user_id LEFT JOIN reports R ON R.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND R.target_id = C.comment_id GROUP BY C.comment_id, C.post_id, U.nickname, C.content, C.created_at, C.status ORDER BY C.created_at DESC

SELECT C.comment_id, C.post_id, U.nickname AS writer_nickname, C.content, COUNT(R.report_id) AS report_count, C.created_at, C.status FROM comments C JOIN users U ON C.writer_id = U.user_id LEFT JOIN reports R ON R.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND R.target_id = C.comment_id WHERE C.comment_id = #{commentId} GROUP BY C.comment_id, C.post_id, U.nickname, C.content, C.created_at, C.status

SELECT C.comment_id, C.post_id, U.nickname AS writer_nickname, C.content, COUNT(R.report_id) AS report_count, C.created_at, C.status FROM comments C JOIN users U ON C.writer_id = U.user_id LEFT JOIN reports R ON R.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND R.target_id = C.comment_id
GROUP BY C.comment_id, C.post_id, U.nickname, C.content, C.created_at, C.status ORDER BY C.created_at DESC, C.comment_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments C JOIN users U ON C.writer_id = U.user_id

where.if: AND ( C.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR U.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.update: UPDATE community_posts SET status = #{status}, deleted_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DELETED' THEN NOW() WHEN #{status} = 'ACTIVE' THEN NULL ELSE deleted_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}

UPDATE comments SET status = #{status}, deleted_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DELETED' THEN NOW() WHEN #{status} = 'ACTIVE' THEN NULL ELSE deleted_at END, deleted_by_admin_id = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DELETED' THEN #{adminId} WHEN #{status} = 'ACTIVE' THEN NULL ELSE deleted_by_admin_id END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
